claim: On September 10, 2025, Charlie Kirk — the 31-year-old co-founder of Turning Point USA — was fatally shot in the neck by a single bullet at Utah Valley University in Orem, Utah, during an outdoor campus debate attended by approximately 3,000 people. The bullet was fired from a rooftop approximately 142 yards (130 m) from the event. Utah Governor Spencer Cox publicly characterized the killing as a 'political assassination.'

sources.label: Wikipedia — “Assassination of Charlie Kirk”
sources.quote: Charlie Kirk, an American right-wing political activist, was assassinated at Utah Valley University in Orem, Utah

sources.label: FBI — “Utah Valley Shooting Updates” (Federal Bureau of Investigation press releases)
KUER (NPR Utah) — “Conservative activist Charlie Kirk is fatally shot at Utah Valley University rally” (Sep 10, 2025)
BIBLE Companion / @bible.app_, Instagram reel DTQb5oiAMHb (Jan 8, 2026) — surfacing source

notes: Anchored to y2025 (existing chapter shell 'Where we are'). Wikipedia URL fetched and verbatim confirmed. The reel cited as the surfacing source advances an 'exploding lavalier microphone' kill-mechanism theory; that theory is not supported by any primary forensic source. The verified facts here are: the location, date, single-bullet-to-the-neck wound, rooftop firing position, and Cox's public characterization.
